name: Chicken Olivia
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375.
Mix chicken, rice, soup, mayonnaise, water chestnuts, onion, and lemon juice in a 9x13 inch dish. (Optional: Add 3 chopped hard-boiled eggs.)
Bake for 30 minutes. Meanwhile, melt margarine in saucepan. Stir in cornflake crumbs and almonds.
Spread topping on casserole. Bake another 15 minutes.
